heading: Registers; preference eligibles who resigned
label: 3314 Registers; preference eligibles who resigned
text: A preference eligible who resigns, on request to the Office of Personnel Management, is entitled to have his name placed again on all registers for which he may have been qualified, in the order named by .section 3313 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 865, .June 27, 1944, ch. 287, § 1658 Stat. 391The last 28 words of former section 865 relating to recertification and reappointments are omitted since under sections 3317 and 3318(a) certification and appointment follow from placing on registers.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
Amendments1978— substituted “Office of Personnel Management” for “Civil Service Commission”.Pub. L. 95–454
Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–454section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this titleOct. 13, 1978
